title: delphinium exaltatum var. trolliifolium
intro: Delphinium exaltatum var. trolliifolium, also known as the Tall Delphinium or Tall Larkspur, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its tall spikes of blue or purple flowers and deeply lobed leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Delphinium exaltatum var. trolliifolium include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as pain relief and reduced inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
